reviews.review_msg: Sim was just a fun professor to have this semester. She made lectures engaging and made assignments easy to engage with as well. Would definitely take another course with her in the future.
lectures can be a bit painful at times, but overall she is a great prof.
Amazing Professor! She is super understanding, fair marker, easy going. She is very passionate and keeps all her lectures fun and engaging. (GSWS 204 & GSWS 319)

She is SUPER nice, hilarious and inspiring. I took the fitness course with her and it was really interesting and relatable. She was realllyyyyy easy on the marking, you would have to hand in nothing to fail.
Amazing prof! Very knowledgeable, sophisticated, open-minded, and cares very much about our learning. Best experience at SFU!

100% recommend taking a class with Eirini! She is energetic and approachable, which make you want to attend class . I'm thankful she is open minded, because I wrote my term paper on a really controversial topic. Definitely suggest seeing her during office hours, as she gave me helpful feedback. Would love to take more classes with her!

Amazing, interesting special topics class. Class was fun and generated good discussion. Robert so approachable and nice.  Course content was refreshing. It is very disorienting as a social science student to have my papers marked like English papers, but I adapted.
A great professor! I really enjoyed her lecturing style which was quite similar to that of a history professor. Really thorough and interesting in-class slides. A very good marker as well!

This class seemed easy and fun at first! but when it came to the times that we had to do the assigmnets, there was not a clear rubric in place because she says "I don't want to out you guys in the box, and you guys have to be creative", but the comment she provides is generic and not helpful and she gives the low grades back a month later

Has cancelled more lectures than taught, given us ridiculous "assignments" in lieu: Watch an Amy Schumer movie. Post 250 words about Valentine's Day. Create a playlist. Hasn't marked the one assignment she has given us, and it was due a month and a half ago. Rude and demeaning. I don't know why she's teaching, she clearly has no interest in it.
Unclear in what she expected for assignments-- and information she gave was occasionally outdated. Marking was tough and vague feedback.
